physical-AI serving

pain_signals: Addresses developer frustration with slow inference in IDE-adjacent AI by offering optimized, fast LLMs
Solves the problem of fragmented, passive AI tools by deploying proactive, collaborative AI coworkers
Eliminates CLI dependency for GitHub operations by offering a native macOS GUI
Tackles the challenge of AI cost management and unit economics by providing a fintech-style dashboard
Planning a 10-day trip used to mean 20 tabs, 3 guidebooks, and hours of Reddit rabbit holes
AI can also hallucinate restaurants that closed, attractions that don't exist, and visa rules that changed last month
One-off AI workshops produce a brief surge of interest, then nothing changes
No more tab switching. No more context shifting.
